name: More Basic Recipes for Yellow Squash
recipeInstructions:
Summer Squash and Onion
1. Add 1 coarsely chopped onion and cook with the squash.
2. Bring 1 cup water to a boil; add the squash and simmer over medium heat, covered for 3 - 5 minutes or until just tender; drain.
3. Add the butter, season to taste, and toss to coat. Serve hot.
Summer Squash and Tomatoes
1. Two minutes before the squash is done, add 2 tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped with some of the liquid gently squeezed out.
Summer Squash with Horseradish Cream
1. Mix 1/2 cup sour cream with 1 tablespoon prepared horseradish.
2. Add to the cooked squash, and reheat for a few minutes before serving.
